source: Kaggle T4, Qwen2.5-1.5B + LoRA, src/training/train_trajectory.py --task torus --constrained_velocity
design: frozen cortex with TOROIDAL self-supervised pretraining (harmonics of L=1.6); moves never in the prompt; a torus has no faithful Euclidean text description (leakage rebuttal)
metric: exact 9-cell accuracy: cortex-ON vs cortex-OFF (text-only) per path length; chance ~11-18%
paired_p_note: paired sign-flip permutation p = 0.0328 at every length (all 6 seeds cortex-ON > text-only-OFF): SIGNIFICANT, clears the n=3 floor (0.25).
headline: cortex-ON >> text-only-OFF (chance) on a non-Euclidean (toroidal) world by +52 to +73 points, EVERY seed, p=0.033 at all lengths = the LLM causally reads a path-integrated toroidal code, leakage-proof. ON magnitude seed-variable (CIs wide), direction significant and consistent.
contrast: single-item readouts (return/distance/bearing/torus/elapsed-time) transfer to the frozen LLM; pairwise comparison (relational) does not (results/relational_llm.json) -- an honest boundary.
